lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's going on here? Where is everyone?

lines.speaker: Faaid
lines.text: Most are in the city. As for the rest, hopefully somewhere nicer than this place.

lines.speaker: Faaid
lines.text: Yes. When we heard they were going to lock Menaphos down and shut the gates, most people here decided they'd be better off behind the walls than outside them.

lines.speaker: Faaid
lines.text: We didn't get much warning. People had to rush to gather whatever they could. Some things had to be left behind, along with some people...

lines.speaker: Faaid
lines.text: It could have been worse. Had we been in Sophanem, we'd have had no warning at all. I just hope it won't be long before things are back to normal.

lines.speaker: Faaid
lines.text: Thank you, traveller. Stay safe out there. These are troubling times.
